lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Bal
lines.text: This is TzHaar terminal chamber, TzHaar rest here to draw warmth from the volcano.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Bal
lines.text: As TzHaar grow older we lose heat and begin to solidify. Drawing heat from the volcano allows us to prolong this process.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Bal
lines.text: Over time TzHaar will eventually harden and cease to be molten entirely before turning to rock, known as Haar-Tok.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Mej-Bal
lines.text: In essence yes, as Haar-Tok can not move or communicate but the former TzHaar remains conscious.
